title: Living in Boulder vlog 4 - 22 - 2017: BouldeRoman Timeline

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a brief vlog update about working on his 'BouldeRoman' (Boulder Rome) wiki/website project, specifically converting and building a timeline that parallels the Roman historical timeline. He explains the page structure he's creating and mentions listening to Livy via LibriVox while working.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: This is his most important current project and he wants to build momentum on it this weekend
Finds it 'trippy' and interesting that his fictional Boulder-Rome calendar aligns with actual Roman dates
Intrigued by the legend and calls it interesting if it was a real prediction

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Right now, it's April 22nd, 2:52 PM.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm working on my Boulder Room page.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I divided the Boulder Room page into older and timeline sections, which took me two days.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday, I was working on the timeline and converting dates.

claims.subject: Kyle's timeline
claims.claim: The Boulder timeline is the same as the wrong timeline, so you can use the same calendar.

claims.subject: Kyle's timeline
claims.claim: Every event in the Boulder timeline corresponds to the same year in other timelines.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: In the year 762, there's a bottle mentioned in the Boulder timeline, which is trippy.

claims.subject: Boulder Room
claims.claim: The Boulder Room has a legend that predicts the last 1,000 years.

claims.subject: Boulder Room
claims.claim: The Boulder Room was the capital of Italy for 1,000 to 4,000 years.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm motivated to work on the Google Docs for the Boulder Room because I want to see how it looks.

claims.subject: Kyle's project
claims.claim: My Boulder Room project includes pages for timeline, time chart, language, tribes, cities, buildings, and battles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm looking forward to working on the cities and tribes sections of the Boulder Room project.

claims.subject: Wikipedia
claims.claim: Wikipedia has a feature where you can type in a name and year to see events, which I plan to use for my timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I plan to focus on my Boulder Room project this weekend to build momentum.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I want to get my Boulder Room project to a point where I can estimate how long it will take.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The Boulder Room project is my most important project right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have other tasks to do, like Google Docs and the wrong timeline.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm listening to Livy on LibriVox, which has a different writing style than my website.

claims.subject: LibriVox
claims.claim: The LibriVox readings are from a different book with the same language but different writing than my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I have to find the context or mentions of people in the LibriVox readings on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I haven't decided what to put in the background of my video.
